---
title: "decrease_order"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `decrease_order()`

Decrease Order

## Usage

```r
decrease_order(
  order_id,
  reduce_by,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `order_id` | Character. The order ID to decrease. |
| `reduce_by` | Integer. Number of contracts to reduce by. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with the updated order details.

## Description

Decreases the remaining quantity of a resting order. Setting to 0 cancels the order.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Reduce order by 5 contracts
decrease_order("order-uuid", reduce_by = 5)

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other trading: 
`amend_order()`,
`batch_cancel_orders()`,
`batch_create_orders()`,
`cancel_all_orders()`,
`cancel_order()`,
`create_order()`,
`get_order()`
